reviews.review_description: The game has an original scenario and recent updates, but it requires further improvement in terms of graphics and menu design. Additionally, the core mechanisms, controls, and camera angles could benefit from more work. Despite these areas for improvement, overall, it is still considered an excellent game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. New updates are in progress to bring improvements to the game and more trip world

reviews.review_title: Not good  very short no content
reviews.review_description: Not good at all fly into game race 2 laps around a short circuit then back in the air to parasail around the island then the end. Hopefully game will expand with their Jurassic world tease at the beginning

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, we have added two additional great worlds: the "Desert Pearl" world, and the "Jurassic Land" world. More experiences will be added too soon

reviews.review_description: Wonderful experience, especially racing part, and the para-sailing. It was amazing!

developer_response.body: we are looking for your feedback and trying out the newly added world the "Desert Pearl", enjoy riding Camel in the desert Sahara. We have added "Jurassic Land" for dinosaurs fans too, Enjoy
